title: WifiService getChannelData uses weaker permission check than getScanResults for location data
notes: getScanResults() enforces enforceCanAccessScanResults (location permission + location enabled). getChannelData() (line 4849) only enforces enforceNearbyDevicesPermission (NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES). App with NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES + neverForLocation flag avoids location permission but gets frequency/AP-count distribution — a location fingerprint. Research shows WiFi channel occupancy can be used for coarse localization.
